title: Creative Workflow
subtitle: A shared workspace for agents, storyboards, and research.
modelLocked: Model switching is available in the current conversation.
inputPlaceholder: Type a message, Enter to send, Shift + Enter for newline
stoppedHint: Stopped this response. You can send again to continue.
interruptedHint: The connection was interrupted before the reply finished. You can retry to continue.
importProjectDescription: Once imported, AI will continuously reference this project's name, description, parsed documents, textual asset info, inspirations, storyboard prompts, and saved project prompts.
importProjectEmptyHint: Create a project first, then you can import it into chat.
projectPromptSuggestionProjectMissing: Import a project into this chat first
researchTextOnlyHint: Deep research supports text and files, but not images
researchFailedNoReason: The task failed without a detailed reason.
researchCompletedNoReport: Task completed but no report was returned.
exportWordNoReport: This task has no report to export yet
researchRunningHint: Keep this page open to watch live progress. Even if you close it, the task continues in background and a result message will be sent to Inbox.

imageMode.title: In-Chat Image Creation Agent
imageMode.hint: Enter a creative idea and the agent will decide whether it is ready to generate or whether it should ask a few button-based follow-up questions to refine the prompt first.
imageMode.preferencesHint: A manual aspect ratio here overrides the agent's default automatic ratio behavior.
imageMode.aspectUnsupported: This model has no extra aspect-ratio choices, so it will use the model default or adaptive ratio.
imageMode.contextUnsupported: This model does not support chat context image editing. Use text only, or go to Create for image-to-image editing.
imageMode.inputPlaceholder: Upload references and describe your idea. I will decide whether to create now or refine it first.

chatEmptyDesc: Pick a workflow and start immediately.
loginDesc: Sign in to start agent and workflow creation

errors.send: Failed to send message, please try again
errors.emptyMessage: Please enter a message or upload images/files
errors.emptyAutoPrompt: Please describe what you want to create
errors.uploadSize: Each image must be less than 5MB
errors.fileDisabled: File upload has been disabled by admin
errors.fileCountLimit: You can upload at most {max} files
errors.updateProjectMasterPrompt: Failed to update the project master prompt
errors.projectRequiredForPrompt: Import a project before saving a reusable project prompt
errors.modelNoImageAfterSwitch: The selected model does not support image input. Pending images were cleared.
errors.streamInterrupted: The chat connection was interrupted. Please try again.
errors.researchCreate: Failed to create deep research task
errors.researchPoll: Failed to fetch deep research progress
errors.researchTextOnly: Deep research supports text and files, but not images
